$comment: Do-not-translate terms for the build-time DeepL pipeline (scripts/translate.mjs and scripts/lib/richtext-translate.mjs, via scripts/lib/deepl.mjs). Each term is protected verbatim through translation. Matching is CASE-SENSITIVE and bounded to whole tokens, longest term first. URLs and email addresses are protected automatically by pattern in deepl.mjs and do NOT need to be listed here. ICU placeholders ({name}, {count, plural, …}) and Lingui/HTML component tags (<0>, </0>, <strong>) are likewise auto-protected.
